name: PRE-RICH
description: PRE-RICH is a community-driven meme token built on the Solana blockchain, designed to combine internet culture, humor, and decentralized participation within the fast-growing Solana ecosystem. Inspired by the idea of being “pre-rich” before mainstream adoption, the project aims to bring together a community of early supporters, traders, and crypto enthusiasts who share a common belief in the power of memes and community-driven markets.
